query: Japan HFMD hand-foot-and-mouth disease national cases per sentinel (定点当たり報告数) Week 27 2026 provisional (速報) IDWR JIHS. Also confirmed Week 25 and Week 26 values, and week-over-week trajectory for weeks 20-27 of the 2026 season.
answer:
## Summary

**Primary finding on Week 27:** The national (全国) provisional per-sentinel value for HFMD (手足口病) for **Week 27 (June 29–July 5, 2026) has NOT yet been published by JIHS** as of the accessible data (retrieved 2026-07-14). The JIHS IDWR provisional index confirms **Week 26 is the most recent national week available**, consistent with the ~1-week publication lag. Week 27 national data should appear around July 10–15, 2026. Currently W27 exists only at prefecture/local level (Saga 11.83, Hyogo 6.66, Hokkaido 0.68).

**Confirmed national per-sentinel values:**
- **Week 25** (Jun 15–21) = **3.40** ✓ (confirmed by both jmedj/JIHS and beans-mc)
- **Week 26** (Jun 22–28) = **4.61** ✓ (10,396 cases / ~2,350 pediatric sentinels)

**Trajectory (national, weeks 20–27):** Continuous increase every week since Week 20. Confirmed sequence: W23 = 1.98 → W24 = 2.75 (+38.9%) → W25 = 3.40 (+23.6%) → W26 = 4.61 (+35.6%). W25 ran ~4.59× the 10-year median. The wave moved west→east: Kyushu → Chugoku/western Japan (by W24) → Tokyo metro area (by W25–26, Tokyo hit warning level at W26). The national warning threshold is 5.0 per sentinel — national W26 (4.61) is approaching but below it, while many individual prefectures (Oita, Shimane, Kagoshima, Kumamoto, etc.) already far exceed it.

The full report with all quantitative data points and sources has been recorded via the structured output.

sources.title: IDWR速報 2026年 (JIHS provisional data index — confirms Week 26 is latest available)
sources.snippet: Lists provisional IDWR data weeks 1-26 of 2026; Week 26 is the most recent entry. No Week 27 link.

sources.snippet: National W26 = 4.61 (10,396 cases); Saga W27 per-sentinel 9.42→11.83.

sources.snippet: Week 24 = 2.75 per sentinel; Week 23 = 1.98; +38.9% WoW. Source JIHS IDWR速報.

sources.title: 全国の感染症 流行マップ 2026年第25週 (national HFMD W25=3.4)
sources.snippet: National HFMD 3.4 per sentinel, +23.6% vs prior, 4.59x the 10-yr median (~0.74). Shimane near 20.

sources.snippet: HFMD Week 27: city 4.17, Hyogo prefecture 6.66; no national figure provided.
